Identifying and Testing Your Offer
Module 3
A great way to start the conversation that
can help you to craft and/or refine your
offer is by simply asking your audience
what they’re interested in.
One way to do this is with a generic Email
Query.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
The Email Query…
• One of the most effective things you can do is just
ask for a comment
• This is very simple but incredibly powerful
• It’s great for getting a response, even if your list
doesn’t usually normally respond to you
When to use the Generic Email Query…
• When you want to identify what your market
wants
• You’re looking for ideas on what to offer
• You want to identify objections
Elements of this strategy include…
• At the bottom of one of your normal emails (blog
post updated, free training, monthly newsletter,
etc.), add a simple request…
• Say “Finally, I have a question for you. If you could
have a private conversation with me, what two
questions would you like to ask me?”
• Provide an email address for you that looks
private like it would go directly to you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Elements of this strategy include…
• As a P.S. add “I’m really serious – go ahead and
push the reply button now and tell me your
question. What do you need help with?”
• Use the responses to help you understand your
prospects wants and needs and begin to craft or
refine a solution that addresses the common
questions asked
Let’s walk through an example…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Testing an Idea…
Testing an Idea…
• Sometimes you want to test an idea to see how
your market will respond and if there is any
interest in your idea
• This can save you time by validating it before you
create it or put much work into it
Elements of this strategy include…
• At the bottom of one of your normal emails (blog
post updated, free training, monthly newsletter,
etc.), ask for feedback.
• Say “I’ve never revealed {your topic} before, but I
think that maybe I should based on some of the
feedback I’ve been getting recently. If you would
like to see me put together {a free report, a video,
a program, etc. on your topic}, then write back to
me. Just hit your reply button and let me know.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
Review your responses…
• Use the responses to help you validate if there is
demand for your offer/Prelaunch content or if you
need to refine your idea.
• The example I’m going to show was used for
testing Prelaunch Content, but you can use it for
your PLC or your main offer
Let’s walk through an example…
First a little background…
• I did this 4-6 weeks ahead of the launch of PLF 3.0
• My idea was to start off the launch with a piece of
content about the really BIG product launches
• But I’ve always published about how the little guy
did well with PLF
• I thought maybe this time I’d do a video about big
(expert) launches
• It was a departure from what I normally do, so I
wanted to test it
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	6
Let’s look at the email…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 9 --

Ok, here’s a huge misconception that’s holding a
lot of people back…
A couple of days ago I was interviewed by a really
smart marketer. She was interviewing me on behalf
of her community of followers.
One of the questions that they asked me was
whether product launches were still effective with
all the “noise” in the market… with so many
launches going on, do they still work?
I’ve heard a few people in that community say
something like “there’s too many emails for too
many product launches - those things don’t work
anymore.”
Well, that’s a pretty interesting theory… except
that it’s COMPLETELY WRONG.
The one thing those people are missing is access
to the actual RESULTS of those launches. They
are on the outside looking in, and they are basing
their opinion on how they are reacting to the
emails in their inbox.
That’s a dangerous thing.
Remember… you are NOT your customer. When
you’re in business, you have to constantly try to
think like your customer.
And trust me, the odds are that your customers
think very differently than you do. They don’t have
the same knowledge, experience, or opinions that
you do. They don’t subscribe to the same email
lists, they don’t read the same blog posts, they
don’t watch the same videos that you do.
And they almost certainly aren’t on a bunch of
Internet Marketing lists, and they haven’t watched
a bunch of product launches.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 9 --

Now up above I talked about those people being
COMPLETELY WRONG about launches not
working anymore… the reason I can say that is that
I get to see the nitty gritty “behind the scenes” stuff
in almost every one of these launches.
At some level, I’ve helped out on many of them.
Sometimes on a full-out contractual level where I
run the launch, but more often on an informal
basis when I’m helping out friends of mine with
strategy or tactical help. And sometimes I take
part as a Joint Venture Partner.
But one way or another, I usually know the results
of every big “guru” launch.
IMPORTANT: this is something that I’ve actually
never talked about publicly before. In the past,
whenever I‘ve talked about product launch results,
I’ve talked about my Product Launch Formula
Owners in all kinds of different small niches.
In fact, some of those PLF Owners in those small
niches have almost become folk heroes…
There’s John Gallagher, the “food stamps to six
figures” guy.
And there’s Jane Savoie - the woman with the
$160k launch in “horse ballet”.
And then there’s the “Marching Band Accessories
Launch” and Frederic with the “Raw Food Launch”...
in fact, I’ve published dozens of Case Studies of
launches in all kinds of obscure launches.
But I’ve NEVER talked about the big “guru
launches” - and there’s a reason I haven’t…
it’s because some people think that product
launches ONLY work if you’re a big guru.
The reality is just the opposite - the reason
people actually become big gurus is because
they did product launches… and that’s why I
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 9 --

kept showing Case Studies of one launch after
another by “regular” folks.
Well, in any case - I’ve gotten an inside look at
inside of almost all of the guru launches. And
there’s some crazy stuff that goes on… but the
one thing I can confirm is that the results are
BIGGER now than they have ever been.
Those people who think they aren’t working haven’t
seen the results in the shopping cart… but I have.
And these launches are CRUSHING it.
Their results are better than ever.
NOTE: As I’ve said, I’ve never revealed the
“behind-the-scenes” stuff about the big “guru”
launches before… and told you why I’ve never
done it. But I’m starting to think that maybe I
should “open the kimono” a little bit… if you
would like to see me put together a free report or
a video about the “big guru launches”, then write
back and let me know. Just hit your reply button
and send me an email - I’ll actually read each
reply. If there’s enough interest, then I’ll put
something together.
In the meantime, remember - you are not your
customer. Don't get sucked into thinking that they
will have the same reaction to stuff that you
have. That will kill your marketing and your
business faster than you can believe.
Best regards,
Jeff
P.S. I’m really serious about this - if you want
